title: Mekanism: Ponders
description: Adds Ponder Scenes for the Mekanism and Mekanism: Generators Mods!
body:
Mekanism: Ponders

**Mekanism: Ponders** adds a variety of Ponder Scenes for [Mekanism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism) using the [Ponder](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Ponder) Mod. This makes it super easy to see how a Multiblock works in the Mekanism mod, and to easily see how its constructed!

Installing [Mekanism: Generators](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism-generators) also adds additional scenes for the Multiblocks included in that mod. ### Here's an ingame example on how to build a Fusion Reactor ![An example scene of the Fusion Reactor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/a1qs/mekanism_ponders/refs/heads/master/fusion_reactor_scene.gif) ## Scenes include: - Fission Reactor _(Mekanism: Generators)_ - Fusion Reactor _(Mekanism: Generators)_ - Industrial Turbine _(Mekanism: Generators)_ - Fission Reactor _(Mekanism: Generators)_ - Induction Matrix - Supercritical Phase Shifter - Thermal Evaporation Plant - Thermoelectric Boiler ## Dependencies - [Mekanism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism) - [Mekanism: Generators](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekanism-generators) *(optional)* # Info - You can use this mod in Modpacks without asking me. - If you find any spelling errors, bugs, have suggestions, or anything else please make an issue [here](https://github.com/a1qs/mekanism_ponders/issues).
